title: Krems an der Donau、Lower Austria — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Krems an der Donau、Lower Austriaの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Krems an der DonauはLower Austriaにある人口25,036の都市です。A picturesque UNESCO-listed town in the Wachau Valley, famous for its apricot orchards, wine production, and beautifully preserved medieval old town.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
